item.title: Limoncello Grapefruit Spritz Recipe
item.description: full recipe: 1 grapefruit, zested 1 tbls kosher salt 4 ounces limoncello 4 ounces grapefruit juice 2 ounces elderflower liqueur Rub the zest of the grapefruit with the kosher salt. Rim two glasses with a slice of grapefruit and dip in the salt. Add ice cubes to the glasses and set aside. To make the cocktail, to a shaker, add ice, the limoncello, grapefruit juice and elderflower liqueur. Shake vigorously. Divide amongst the two glasses. Top with a splash of sparkling water.

media:content.media:title: Limoncello Grapefruit Spritz Recipe
media:content.media:description: full recipe: 1 grapefruit, zested 1 tbls kosher salt 4 ounces limoncello 4 ounces grapefruit juice 2 ounces elderflower liqueur Rub the zest of the grapefruit with the kosher salt. Rim two glasses with a slice of grapefruit and dip in the salt. Add ice cubes to the glasses and set aside. To make the cocktail, to a shaker, add ice, the limoncello, grapefruit juice and elderflower liqueur. Shake vigorously. Divide amongst the two glasses. Top with a splash of sparkling water.

item.title: Delicious and Refreshing: Strawberry Lemonade Sangria
item.description: This strawberry lemonade sangria is delicious, refreshing and full of fresh fruit like strawberries and lemon slices. Summer is coming up so it’s perfect for a summer weekend.

media:content.media:title: Delicious and Refreshing: Strawberry Lemonade Sangria
media:content.media:description: This strawberry lemonade sangria is delicious, refreshing and full of fresh fruit like strawberries and lemon slices. Summer is coming up so it’s perfect for a summer weekend.

item.title: Buffalo Chicken Wrap Recipe
item.description:
Here's the full recipe: 1 pound chicken tenders 1/2 cup all-purpose flour 2 large eggs, beaten 1 cup panko bread crumbs 1/2 cup finely grated parmesan Frying oil Buffalo sauce (I used Frank’s Hot) 4 slices provolone, halved Iceberg lettuce, shredded
Place the chicken tenders on a cutting board. Create a assembly line with three bowls. In the first, add the flour; in the second, the beaten eggs; in the third, combine the panko bread crumbs, parmesan and 1/2 teaspoon kosher salt. Heat up the oil until hot. Dip the chicken tenders in the flour, then the egg and lastly the bread crumbs. Repeat. Pan fry the chicken tenders in the oil until crispy on both sides, about 2-3 minutes. Cut up the chicken into slices and toss with buffalo sauce.
Assemble the wraps by placing a large (burrito-sized) tortilla on a cutting board. Add the provolone slices to the center. Top with chicken, add iceberg lettuce and wrap like a burrito. Slice in half.

media:content.media:title: Buffalo Chicken Wrap Recipe
media:content.media:description:
Here's the full recipe: 1 pound chicken tenders 1/2 cup all-purpose flour 2 large eggs, beaten 1 cup panko bread crumbs 1/2 cup finely grated parmesan Frying oil Buffalo sauce (I used Frank’s Hot) 4 slices provolone, halved Iceberg lettuce, shredded
Place the chicken tenders on a cutting board. Create a assembly line with three bowls. In the first, add the flour; in the second, the beaten eggs; in the third, combine the panko bread crumbs, parmesan and 1/2 teaspoon kosher salt. Heat up the oil until hot. Dip the chicken tenders in the flour, then the egg and lastly the bread crumbs. Repeat. Pan fry the chicken tenders in the oil until crispy on both sides, about 2-3 minutes. Cut up the chicken into slices and toss with buffalo sauce.
Assemble the wraps by placing a large (burrito-sized) tortilla on a cutting board. Add the provolone slices to the center. Top with chicken, add iceberg lettuce and wrap like a burrito. Slice in half.

item.title: Detroit-Style Pizza Recipe
item.description: This Detroit Style Pizza recipe has a thick, delicious yeasted crust. It’s topped with the perfect amount of sauce, melty cheesy and a blanket of pepperoni cups. And while most recipes require a 24-hour ferment, this recipe takes a fraction of the time!

media:content.media:title: Detroit-Style Pizza Recipe
media:content.media:description: This Detroit Style Pizza recipe has a thick, delicious yeasted crust. It’s topped with the perfect amount of sauce, melty cheesy and a blanket of pepperoni cups. And while most recipes require a 24-hour ferment, this recipe takes a fraction of the time!

item.title: Strawberry Cream Cake
item.description: This Strawberry Cream Cake plays consists of a fluffy white cake, layered with a whipped buttercream and fresh strawberries. This cake recipe is delicious, refreshing and ode to the Wimbledon classic.

media:content.media:title: Strawberry Cream Cake
media:content.media:description: This Strawberry Cream Cake plays consists of a fluffy white cake, layered with a whipped buttercream and fresh strawberries. This cake recipe is delicious, refreshing and ode to the Wimbledon classic.

item.title: Yummy, Cheesy Asparagus Tart Recipe
item.description: A simple asparagus tart eaturing a cheesy filling and a brunch-friendly finish.

media:content.media:title: Yummy, Cheesy Asparagus Tart Recipe
media:content.media:description: A simple asparagus tart eaturing a cheesy filling and a brunch-friendly finish.

item.title: Cozy One-Pan Lemon Chicken Orzo
item.description: This cozy one-pan chicken orzo is the perfect weeknight meal; it comes together in a single pan in under 30 minutes. It has a bright lemony flavor, spinach and lots of parmesan which all gives it a delicious, light and creamy flavor.

media:content.media:title: Cozy One-Pan Lemon Chicken Orzo
media:content.media:description: This cozy one-pan chicken orzo is the perfect weeknight meal; it comes together in a single pan in under 30 minutes. It has a bright lemony flavor, spinach and lots of parmesan which all gives it a delicious, light and creamy flavor.

item.title: Fluffy Lemon Ricotta Pancakes Recipe
item.description: These are the Best Lemon Ricotta Pancakes. Bright lemon zest and rich ricotta adds a sophisticated indulgence to your classic pancake recipe. Easy to whip up in 30 minutes, these light and fluffy lemon pancakes are the perfect thing to make for breakfast or brunch

media:content.media:title: Fluffy Lemon Ricotta Pancakes Recipe
media:content.media:description: These are the Best Lemon Ricotta Pancakes. Bright lemon zest and rich ricotta adds a sophisticated indulgence to your classic pancake recipe. Easy to whip up in 30 minutes, these light and fluffy lemon pancakes are the perfect thing to make for breakfast or brunch

item.title: Blueberry Oatmilk Iced Latte Recipe
item.description: Sweet and delicious blueberry oatmilk iced latte recipe for a refreshing drink idea.

media:content.media:title: Blueberry Oatmilk Iced Latte Recipe
media:content.media:description: Sweet and delicious blueberry oatmilk iced latte recipe for a refreshing drink idea.

item.title: Soft and Fluffy Berry Cheese Danish
item.description: This pillowy Berry Cheese Danish is made with a rich, brioche-style dough that’s incredibly soft and fluffy. It’s filled with a sweet lemon cream cheese mix and topped with jam. Baked until golden and tender, this sweet yeast pastry strikes the balance of buttery, tangy, and sweet.

media:content.media:title: Soft and Fluffy Berry Cheese Danish
media:content.media:description: This pillowy Berry Cheese Danish is made with a rich, brioche-style dough that’s incredibly soft and fluffy. It’s filled with a sweet lemon cream cheese mix and topped with jam. Baked until golden and tender, this sweet yeast pastry strikes the balance of buttery, tangy, and sweet.

item.title: Crispy Lemon Pepper Chicken Wings
item.description: These Crispy Lemon Pepper Wings are oven-baked, deeply seasoned, and finished with a lemony butter sauce that clings to every crispy edge. No frying required, and the whole process is straightforward enough for game day or a casual get-together.

media:content.media:title: Crispy Lemon Pepper Chicken Wings
media:content.media:description: These Crispy Lemon Pepper Wings are oven-baked, deeply seasoned, and finished with a lemony butter sauce that clings to every crispy edge. No frying required, and the whole process is straightforward enough for game day or a casual get-together.

item.title: Delicious Strawberry Shortcake Biscuits Recipe
item.description: These strawberry biscuits are flaky, buttery, and absolutely delicious, topped with a vanilla glaze. Inspired by Popeyes but way better, I love making them in the summer when fresh strawberries are at their best.

media:content.media:title: Delicious Strawberry Shortcake Biscuits Recipe
media:content.media:description: These strawberry biscuits are flaky, buttery, and absolutely delicious, topped with a vanilla glaze. Inspired by Popeyes but way better, I love making them in the summer when fresh strawberries are at their best.
